name: MikroTik Hot Swap PSU G1040A-60WF
title: MikroTik Hot Swap PSU G1040A-60WF
description: The MikroTik Hot Swap PSU G1040A-60WF is a reliable and convenient power supply designed to ensure uninterrupted operation of high-performance MikroTik network devices. It is compatible with CCR2004, CRS510, and CRS504 routers and switches, which come with two hot-swappable redundant power supplies. If one power supply fails, the other automatically takes over, and with the G1040A-60WF, you can replace the faulty unit without turning off or restarting the device. This minimizes downtime and keeps your network running smoothly even in critical environments. The power supply supports an input voltage of 100–240 V at up to 1.5 A and provides a stable 12 V output at up to 5 A, delivering a total power of 60 W. Its robust and compact design ensures long-lasting reliability, easy replacement, and convenient maintenance, making the G1040A-60WF the ideal solution for professional network setups where continuous operation is essential.
